categories.label: Attribute Goals
categories.description: Reputation Stars earned from meeting Class card Attribute Goals for each row

categories.label: Class Color Dice
categories.description: 1 Reputation Star per die on Character Sheet matching your Class color

categories.label: Alignment Card
categories.description: Reputation Stars gained or lost based on tracking token position on Alignment card

categories.label: Backstory Card
categories.description: Reputation Stars for matching dice colors/positions to Backstory card (0-1=0, 2-3=1, 4-5=3, 6=6)

categories.label: Armor Cards
categories.description: Reputation Stars from Armor sets (Chain, Leather, Mystic) plus Class color bonus per set

categories.label: Trait Cards
categories.description: Reputation Stars earned from meeting criteria on collected Trait cards
